summary: Independent read-only QA review accepts the M6 Alpha no-P0/P1 validation evidence at review commit 6df1af8b. The reviewed diff and branch scope stay within allowed process/task/message paths; required tests are recorded with exit_code 0; focused reruns of the M6 batch balance artifact and start-to-victory save/load regression passed; no accepted P0/P1 blocker or forbidden product-scope change was found.

tests_run.result: Clean before QA handoff creation and after focused reruns.
Only project state, task registry, task JSON, and writer handoff paths changed; no forbidden path was touched.
Branch delta contains only allowed process/task/message/state paths for this validation workflow.

tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const task=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/tasks/active/M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001.json','utf8')); const h=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('project/messages/outbox/M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001__MSG-20260628-M6-NO-P0P1-REVIEW__test_engineer.json','utf8')); console.log('required', task.required_tests.length); console.log('recorded', h.tests_run.length); console.log('nonzero', h.tests_run.filter(t=>t.exit_code!==0).map(t=>t.command).join('|')||'none');"
tests_run.result: Task has 16 required tests; writer handoff records 16 tests; no nonzero exit codes.
Focused rerun produced artifactHash 99d64950, 3 scenarios, 2 seeds, 6 runs, and p0p1CandidateCount 0.
Focused M6 start-to-victory replay/save/load regression passed: 1 file, 5 tests.

decisions: ACCEPT: validation evidence satisfies the task acceptance criteria for no accepted P0/P1 data corruption, determinism, save/load, command parity, security, package-boundary, or start-to-victory blockers.

The writer handoff records every required test with exit_code 0, including install, check, test, content validation, determinism, performance baseline, Web build, Storybook build, desktop security/package, E2E, M6 batch, M6 start-to-victory replay/save/load, taskctl validate, and diff check.

Diff scope is limited to allowed task, state, registry, route, and message evidence files; no PROJECT_STATUS.md, gate doc, roadmap, acceptance matrix, content-source, tools, CI, or release artifact path changed.
No evidence was found of feature implementation, telemetry/accounts/server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, manual node battle, commercial decisions, or P0/P1 severity downgrade.
M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context was explicitly rechecked and preserved as a non-blocking context, not upgraded or hidden.
risks: Non-blocking traceability note: the writer handoff's internal commit field names 64d7ff09, while the routed review commit and current task metadata name 6df1af8b. The routed review target and actual reviewed diff are unambiguous, so this does not block acceptance.
Build, Storybook, and Node warnings remain recorded as non-blocking build-health warnings; no P0/P1 consequence was observed in QA reruns.
requested_action: Integrate the accepted QA verdict for M6-ALPHA-NO-P0P1-VALIDATION-001 or perform lead closure routing.
